name: WEATHER.COM
message: [AI generated] "Weather.com" is primarily recognized for providing comprehensive weather forecasts and information online. It is owned by IBM and forms a part of The Weather Company, offering localized forecasts for places all over the world. Besides weather updates, it furnishes weather-related news, insights, educational content, and safety tips. In addition to its web presence, the service is accessible via smartphone apps and a TV channel, The Weather Channel.
